_note: The cafe's small recurring universe. A low-probability prompt hook (see prompt.py) offers ONE of these per gen as an optional background easter egg — a name in a list, a line of fine print, a credit. Never the subject, never explained. Regulars notice; nobody else needs to. Add entries when a gen or a cat invents something worth keeping; keep hints short and usable in any era.

elements.name: Pepper
elements.hint: a shy cat, missing since roughly 1998, last seen behind the bus stop on 4th; answers to nothing; sightings are occasionally reported and never confirmed

elements.name: Eugene
elements.hint: a small spider who lives in a lobby corner; named by someone who had no authority to name him; unbothered; welcome

elements.name: Roy
elements.hint: a late husband, fondly remembered; had exactly one hobby at a time (woodworking, jam, model trains, birdhouses); believed simpler is best; understood a load-bearing seam

elements.name: Margot, age 4 ½
elements.hint: a child artist of local renown; signs everything with her age; her work has a sun in the corner; ask about Margot

elements.name: Frederick
elements.hint: somebody's cousin; claims to have been an extra in something; claims to detect flavors that are not there; claims a lot of things; sticks by every claim

elements.name: Mortimer
elements.hint: a kitten who dropped by once and is still talked about; whereabouts unknown; left an impression

elements.name: Deli Mustard
elements.hint: a band of unverifiable genre; plays $3 shows; no cover for birthdays; sometimes billed with Half Karen and the Eugene Eugenes

elements.name: The Good Wok
elements.hint: a takeout place; delivery 11–9, cash or check; menu item C4 is ??? and costs $0.00; the almond cookies come six to a bag

elements.name: 429 Persimmon Ln
elements.hint: an address where everything is perpetually for sale — the chairs, the photos, the lamps, a kettle; please don't haggle on the kettle

elements.name: the sign above the door
elements.hint: reads 'if the door is open, you are welcome inside.' — est. ~1962; quoted occasionally, attributed inconsistently

elements.name: the 3:47 light
elements.hint: every day at 3:47 the light hits the second shelf exactly right; some schedules, timetables, and instructions quietly account for this

elements.name: 555-PEPR
elements.hint: a phone number on tear-away tabs; calling it is never described; the tabs are always mostly taken
